name: Bold
description: Acts decisively under pressure; rivals think twice.

name: Cautious
description: Weighs every risk before committing.

name: Shrewd
description: Reads a deal before it is spoken; +5% better prices at the Agora.

name: Naive
description: Takes others at their word, and pays for it.

name: Generous
description: Open-handed with kin and clients; income flows out as favor.

name: Greedy
description: Squeezes every obol, and is known for it.

name: Proud
description: Will not be slighted before equals.

name: Humble
description: Wears authority lightly; the temples approve.

name: Ambitious
description: Always reaching for the next office.

name: Content
description: Satisfied with a steady oikos and quiet years.

name: Pious
description: Keeps the rites without fail.

name: Impious
description: Trusts reason over the gods.

name: Harbor-Born
description: Raised on the quays of Massalia; +Favor with shipmasters.

name: Highborn
description: Born to an old House and its expectations.

name: Low-Born
description: Came up hard, with calloused hands.

name: Trader's Instinct
description: Smells a margin across the whole sea.

name: Drillmaster
description: Turns farmhands into a phalanx.

name: Temple-Raised
description: Trained in the rites from boyhood.

name: Stoic
description: Endures loss and insult without breaking.

name: Resilient
description: Recovers quickly from setbacks.

name: Unproven
description: The Houses have not yet measured you; fades as your standing grows.

name: Renowned
description: Your name carries weight in the assembly.

name: Feared
description: Rivals step carefully around you.

name: Disgraced
description: A public failure clings to your name.

name: Turncoat
description: Abandoned a party once; allies remember, and trust comes dearer.
